title: Elementary Administrative Teacher on Special Assignment
status: Full Time, 1 FTELevel 3 Teacher on Special Assignment includes a temporary/at-will contract for 18 extra days on contract.Minimum RequirementsEDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCEA minimum of a Bachelor's Degree and a minimum of 3 years of successful teaching experience in a WCSD elementary setting.CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONSMust have an active Utah professional level Elementary License AND an active Utah School Leadership License.At least one of the following endorsements is preferred:  Reading/Literacy, ESL, Math, or Information TechnologyThe salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):TSA Administrative Teacher on Special Assignment (Elementary).pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
